name: @xifan-coder/plugin-bus
description: XiFan plugin bus package - discovery, registry and loading lifecycle

scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: vitest run src/__tests__/manifest.test.ts src/__tests__/registry.test.ts src/__tests__/discovery.test.ts src/__tests__/plugin-bus.test.ts src/__tests__/process.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run src/__tests__/manifest.test.ts src/__tests__/registry.test.ts src/__tests__/discovery.test.ts src/__tests__/plugin-bus.test.ts src/__tests__/process.test.ts --coverage.enabled true --coverage.provider v8 --coverage.reporter text-summary --coverage.reporter json-summary --coverage.thresholds.lines 75 --coverage.thresholds.functions 75 --coverage.thresholds.statements 75
